_publications._publicationTitle: Development of an adeno-associated virus vector for gene replacement therapy of NF1-related tumors.
_publications._context: The NF1-deficient LN229 glioma cell line was kindly provided by Karisa Schreck of the Johns Hopkins University | LN229 was obtained from ATCC, T98G was a gift from the Laterra laboratory, and both were cultured as recommended

_publications._publicationTitle: MEK Inhibition Enhances the Antitumor Effect of Radiotherapy in NF1-Deficient Glioblastoma.
